project: openreel-video fork — AI-generated objects for self-media video creation

features.name: Slice 0 — Repo bootstrap and architecture exploration
features.description: Fork upstream, set up dev environment (Node, pnpm, Vite), map monorepo structure, locate Three.js integration point, identify GeneratedClip plug-in surface.
features.evidence: See SLICE0_FINDINGS.md. Dev server verified at http://localhost:5173 (HTTP 200). Committed in c55a542.

features.name: Slice 1.1 — GeneratedClip type definition
features.description: Add `GeneratedClip` to `packages/core/src/graphics/types.ts` mirroring ShapeClip/SVGClip shape. Fields: source (TS string), sourceLanguage, providerId, promptHistory, paramsSchema, params, transform, keyframes, blendMode, blendOpacity. Re-export from @openreel/core.
features.evidence: Extended GraphicType union with 'generated'; added GeneratedClip interface, GeneratedClipPromptMessage, GeneratedClipSourceLanguage type alias, and DEFAULT_GENERATED_PARAMS_SCHEMA constant. Auto-exported via existing `graphics/index.ts` → `core/src/index.ts` chain (no manual re-export needed). Verified: `pnpm typecheck` clean across all 5 workspace projects (apps/web, apps/image, packages/core, packages/ui, packages/image-core); `pnpm --filter @openreel/core test:run` 176/176 tests pass in 1.22s, including 50 graphics-engine tests.

features.name: Slice 1.2 — GeneratedClip renderer integration
features.description: Extend `ThreeJSLayerRenderer` with `renderGeneratedClip(clip, time)` or create sibling `GeneratedClipRenderer` sharing the same Scene/Camera. Hook into `canvas-renderers.ts` dispatch. For Slice 1 MVP, support a hard-coded test clip (no AI yet) that draws something visible.
features.evidence: Added `renderGeneratedClip` to ThreeJSLayerRenderer (Three.js / WebGL path) and `renderGeneratedClipOnly` (Canvas 2D fast path) — both draw a colored rectangle whose fill comes from `params.color` (default `#3b82f6`). Source string is intentionally ignored at this layer (sandbox lands in feat-003). Exposed `readGeneratedClipColor` + `DEFAULT_GENERATED_CLIP_COLOR` from threejs-layer-renderer. Extended `GraphicClipUnion` and added `generated` branches in both the 3D dispatch (line ~1540) and 2D dispatch (line ~1606) inside `renderShapeClipToCanvas`. Widened `ShapeClip | SVGClip | StickerClip` literals in Preview.tsx to include GeneratedClip (`getGraphicClipDisplayBounds`, `findGraphicClipAtPoint`, and 5 other call sites). Added 5 unit tests for `readGeneratedClipColor` in `canvas-renderers.test.ts`. Verification: workspace `pnpm typecheck` clean across all 5 projects; `pnpm --filter @openreel/web test:run` 125 passed / 7 skipped (5 new tests for feat-002 all green); the single failing test (`project-store.test.ts:851` `editing templates` track ordering) is pre-existing on upstream main — verified by git-stashing feat-002 changes and reproducing the same failure (120 passed baseline -> 125 passed with feat-002 = exactly +5 new).

features.name: Slice 1.3 — Sandbox execution layer
features.description: Create `apps/web/src/objects/Sandbox.ts`. Execute generated TS source inside a Web Worker. Expose only a procedural SceneDescription protocol (rect/circle/line/text). Define message protocol: init(source) → init-ok|init-error, frame(t, params, requestId) → frame-result|frame-error.
features.evidence: Chose Web Worker + procedural SceneDescription over `new Function` with restricted globals. Reasoning: hang-isolation is the only decisive advantage of either approach for our single-user threat model, and procedural output keeps the Worker complexity much lower than passing Three.js objects across the boundary. Files: `apps/web/src/objects/SceneDescription.ts` (Shape union: rect/circle/line/text, normalized 0..1 coords, EMPTY_SCENE), `sandbox-engine.ts` (pure compileSource + runFrame returning discriminated-union Results, no Worker dependency — fully testable in jsdom), `sandbox-protocol.ts` (postMessage wire types), `sandbox-worker.ts` (thin Worker shell wiring engine to self.onmessage), `Sandbox.ts` (main-thread wrapper: init/renderFrame/getLatestScene/dispose, configurable per-call timeout, requestId multiplexing, Worker factory injection for tests), `index.ts` (barrel export). Verification: workspace `pnpm typecheck` clean across all 5 projects; `pnpm --filter @openreel/web test:run` 147 passed / 7 skipped (vs 125 baseline) = +22 new tests across sandbox-engine.test.ts (14 cases covering compile success/empty/whitespace/syntax-error/non-object/null/missing-frame, runFrame with t/params, thrown errors, malformed scenes) and Sandbox.test.ts (8 cases covering init resolve/reject, frame happy path, getLatestScene, concurrent multiplexing, engine errors surfacing, frame timeout, dispose-rejects-inflight, use-after-dispose); same pre-existing `project-store.test.ts:851` failure as feat-002. AI source contract: an expression evaluating to `{ frame(t, params): SceneDescription }`. No `import` or top-level function declarations allowed (single expression body required by `new Function` wrapping in sandbox-engine).

features.name: Slice 2.1 — AIProvider abstraction
features.description: Define `AIProvider` interface in `apps/web/src/ai/AIProvider.ts`. Methods: generate(request) → AsyncIterable<chunk>, listModels(). Common request shape (system/messages/tools/stream/temperature). Tools use JSON Schema as the lowest common denominator across providers.
features.evidence: Defined provider-neutral types in `apps/web/src/ai/types.ts` (Role, ChatMessage, ContentPart with text/tool_use/tool_result, ToolDefinition with JSON Schema inputSchema, GenerateRequest with model/system/messages/tools/forceTool/temperature/maxTokens, FinishReason, TokenUsage, the GenerateChunk discriminated union: message-start | text-delta | tool-use-start | tool-use-input-delta | tool-use-end | done | error, FinalResult assembly type, FinalToolCall, ModelInfo, ProviderInfo). `AIProvider.ts` defines the interface: info, listModels(), generate(request, options?) -> AsyncIterable<GenerateChunk>, plus GenerateOptions with AbortSignal. Two pure helpers: `streamToFinal` (consume AsyncIterable into FinalResult, assembles concatenated text + ordered tool calls with JSON parsing, throws StreamErrorWithPartialResult on error chunks while preserving partial), `validateGenerateRequest` (runtime shape check returning array of human-readable error strings — empty == valid). `index.ts` barrel exports the public surface. Verification: workspace `pnpm typecheck` clean across all 5 projects; `pnpm --filter @openreel/web test:run` 171 passed / 7 skipped (vs 147 baseline = +24 new tests, all green: streamToFinal.test.ts 8 cases for text/tool-call/concurrent-tools/parse-error/empty-input/usage/error/post-done, validateGenerateRequest.test.ts 16 cases covering model/messages/tools/forceTool/temperature/maxTokens edges). Same pre-existing project-store.test.ts:851 failure as before.

features.name: Slice 2.2 — Provider implementations (Claude + DeepSeek, OpenAI/Compatible deferred)
features.description: Implement ClaudeProvider (anthropic SDK + prompt caching) and DeepSeekProvider (openai SDK + baseURL override to api.deepseek.com). Provider registry with auto-default and switch semantics. OpenAIProvider and CompatibleProvider deferred to a later feat — the DeepSeek implementation already exercises the OpenAI-compatible code path so adding them is a thin re-skin. IndexedDB persistence + encrypted key storage deferred to feat-006 (settings UI) — for now, dev-time keys flow through .env.local.
features.evidence: Live verified end-to-end against real DeepSeek API on 2026-05-16: openai SDK + baseURL=api.deepseek.com/v1 + apiKey -> models endpoint returned deepseek-v4-flash + deepseek-v4-pro; chat.completions.create with stream:true returned a `Hello there friend` response in 236 chunks (231 of which were reasoning_content deltas, 4 content deltas, then finish_reason=stop with proper usage). Confirmed DeepSeek V4 is reasoning-first and that our openai-translation.ts correctly parses delta.content while silently ignoring reasoning_content (a future feat can add a reasoning-delta channel; not blocking). Verified via apps/web/scripts/smoke-deepseek.mjs (node script using openai SDK directly to bypass vitest's jsdom fetch limitations; our DeepSeekProvider's translation is already covered by 11 unit tests with mocked SDK chunks matching this exact wire format). Updated DEEPSEEK_MODELS list from outdated deepseek-chat/deepseek-reasoner to deepseek-v4-flash/deepseek-v4-pro with verified 128k context. Installed @anthropic-ai/sdk ^0.96.0 + openai ^6.37.0 via npmmirror. New files in apps/web/src/ai/providers/: openai-translation.ts (pure async generator translating OpenAI ChatCompletionChunk stream to GenerateChunk; handles delta.content, tool_calls with index/id/function fields, finish_reason mapping, trailing usage chunks; emits synthetic tool-use-end since OpenAI has no explicit marker), anthropic-translation.ts (pure async generator translating Anthropic MessageStreamEvent to GenerateChunk; tracks content_block index to toolCallId, captures cache token usage, defensively emits done if message_stop missing), DeepSeekProvider.ts (uses openai SDK with baseURL https://api.deepseek.com/v1, lists deepseek-chat and deepseek-reasoner models, dangerouslyAllowBrowser, request body translation including assistant tool_calls and role=tool messages), ClaudeProvider.ts (lists claude-opus-4-7 / sonnet-4-6 / haiku-4-5, enables ephemeral prompt caching on system + last tool by default with togglable enablePromptCaching, translates assistant messages with tool_use parts and tool-role messages with tool_result blocks), registry.ts (ProviderRegistry: register/unregister/get/list/setCurrent/getCurrent/getCurrentId, auto-selects first registered as current, unregister of current moves to another or clears), updated apps/web/.env.example with VITE_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY / VITE_OPENAI_API_KEY / VITE_DEEPSEEK_API_KEY / VITE_COMPATIBLE_* . Tests use vi.fn() mocked SDK clients via clientFactory injection — no real network calls. Verification: workspace pnpm typecheck clean across all 5 projects; pnpm --filter @openreel/web test:run -> 213 passed / 7 skipped (vs 171 baseline = +42 new tests across 5 test files: openai-translation.test.ts 7 cases, anthropic-translation.test.ts 6 cases, DeepSeekProvider.test.ts 11 cases including body translation + retryable error classification, ClaudeProvider.test.ts 10 cases including cache_control placement + force tool choice, registry.test.ts 8 cases). Same pre-existing project-store.test.ts:851 failure as before.

features.name: Slice 2.3 — AI Panel MVP (standalone preview, not yet on timeline)
features.description: Create `apps/web/src/components/AIPanel/`. Provider+model dropdown, prompt input, generate button, streaming output area, in-panel sandboxed preview canvas. Toggled by Ctrl+Shift+G. This MVP proves the end-to-end loop (prompt -> AI -> sandbox -> render) without integrating into openreel's timeline / project store; that wiring and encrypted IndexedDB key storage and 'Fix with AI' are deferred to subsequent feats.
features.evidence: AI module: `apps/web/src/ai/objectPrompt.ts` (SYSTEM_PROMPT teaching the SceneDescription contract with a concrete bouncing-circle example + DEFINE_GENERATED_OBJECT_TOOL with JSON Schema for name/source/paramsSchema/defaultParams), `generateObject.ts` (high-level helper using forceTool to get structured output, optional onTextDelta callback, GenerateObjectError class), `providers/bootstrap.ts` (instantiates Claude/DeepSeek providers from VITE_*_API_KEY at module load). Panel: `apps/web/src/components/AIPanel/AIPanel.tsx` (floating overlay, provider+model dropdowns auto-populated from registry, prompt textarea, generate button with streaming text output, in-panel 480x270 preview canvas running its own Sandbox in a requestAnimationFrame loop with frameTimeoutMs=200ms, collapsible 'AI text output' and 'Generated source' sections, error display), `renderScene.ts` (standalone Canvas 2D renderer for SceneDescription — rect/circle/line/text with opacity clamping), `useAIPanelHotkey.ts` (Ctrl+Shift+G / Cmd+Shift+G binding with platform-aware label), `index.ts` (barrel). Mounted in `App.tsx` alongside SearchModal; opens on hotkey, closes on Escape or close button. Tests: +15 cases across generateObject.test.ts (7: parses tool call, defaults for missing fields, forwards request shape, missing tool call error, missing source error, malformed JSON error, onTextDelta tap) and renderScene.test.ts (8: clear-first invariant, rect/circle/line/text placement at normalized coords scaled to canvas size, opacity respect, NaN/out-of-range opacity clamping, shape order preservation). Verification: pnpm typecheck clean across all 5 workspace projects; pnpm --filter @openreel/web test:run -> 228 passed / 7 skipped (vs 213 baseline = +15 new); pnpm dev launches Vite v5.4.21 ready in 1010ms on http://localhost:5173 with AIPanel.tsx served correctly (47416 bytes compiled, with HMR hooks). Same pre-existing project-store.test.ts:851 failure as before.

features.name: Slice 3 — Timeline integration + visual parameter editing
features.description: (a) Add `createGeneratedClip` action to the project store mirroring createShapeClip/createSVGClip. (b) Replace canvas-renderers.ts's hardcoded `params.color` rect path with a per-clip Sandbox -> SceneDescription -> renderScene loop. (c) Add 'Add to timeline' button to AIPanel that calls createGeneratedClip; the panel's standalone preview canvas becomes the AIPanel's editing surface for in-progress objects, while the timeline renders committed ones. (d) Component `apps/web/src/components/ParamPanel/` reads a GeneratedClip's `paramsSchema` and renders inputs (color picker, number slider, vector, select, text); param changes flow back to clip without re-running AI. (Keyframe binding for params is deferred to feat-009 — see Notes.)
features.evidence: Static verification: workspace `pnpm typecheck` clean across all 5 projects (packages/core, packages/ui, packages/image-core, apps/web, apps/image). `pnpm --filter @openreel/core test:run` 187 passed / 0 fail (+11 vs 176 feat-006 baseline: all 11 new tests cover createGenerated / get / list / filter-by-track / delete / updateGeneratedClipParams immutability / updateGeneratedClipSource / updateGeneratedClip timing+transform+keyframes / undefined on missing / loadGeneratedClips replacement / clearCache empties generated). `pnpm --filter @openreel/web test:run` 251 passed / 7 skipped / 1 failed (same pre-existing project-store.test.ts:851 track-ordering fail as feat-002~006 baseline, unrelated to feat-007; net +23 vs 228 baseline = +8 SandboxRegistry.test.ts + +15 schemaToFields.test.ts, with 5 placeholder readGeneratedClipColor tests deleted in the same commit). `pnpm --filter @openreel/web build` 14.45s clean — sandbox-worker chunk lands at 1.31kB. (a) graphics-engine.ts grew createGenerated / getGeneratedClip / getAllGeneratedClips / getGeneratedClipsForTrack / deleteGeneratedClip / updateGeneratedClipParams / updateGeneratedClipSource / updateGeneratedClip / loadGeneratedClips; types.ts adds CreateGeneratedParams. project-store.ts adds createGeneratedClip / getGeneratedClip / updateGeneratedClipParams / updateGeneratedClipSource / deleteGeneratedClip — each mirrors the corresponding shape/svg action; deleteGeneratedClip and updateGeneratedClipSource call SandboxRegistry.dispose first to reclaim the Worker before the engine mutation. ClipHistoryEntryType union grew 'generated'; HistoryPanel.tsx widened its local union to use that type alias and added a Sparkles icon for the new entry kind. (b) apps/web/src/objects/SandboxRegistry.ts (new) is a module singleton wrapping Map<clipId, RegistryEntry { sandbox, sourceHash, ready, initError }> with ensure / get / dispose / disposeAll / size; ensure() rebuilds when djb2(source) changes, disposes the old Worker first. apps/web/src/objects/renderScene.ts (new) holds the SceneDescription Canvas2D renderer (relocated from components/AIPanel/renderScene.ts so both AIPanel and canvas-renderers import from a neutral location; AIPanel/renderScene.ts becomes a one-line re-export to keep its tests green). canvas-renderers.ts: renderGeneratedClipOnly rewritten to translate via clip.transform then call pumpGeneratedClip — which SandboxRegistry.ensure(clip)s, fires sandbox.renderFrame(localTime, clip.params) without awaiting, and synchronously renderScene's the latest scene; localTime = max(0, time - clip.startTime). The Three.js dispatch branch now uses a lazily-allocated module-level offscreen HTMLCanvasElement: clear → pump → renderGeneratedClipFromCanvas (new method) which wraps the offscreen in THREE.CanvasTexture + plane + applyTransform + applyBlendMode. The 5 readGeneratedClipColor / DEFAULT_GENERATED_CLIP_COLOR placeholder tests + the two exported helpers from threejs-layer-renderer.ts were deleted in the same commit (orphan). (c) AIPanel.tsx gained PendingGeneration state holding {name, source, paramsSchema, defaultParams, providerId = provider.info.id, model = modelId}, set inside onGenerate after init success and cleared on failure; new onAddToTimeline callback finds the first graphics track via useProjectStore.getState().project.timeline.tracks, reads playhead via useTimelineStore.getState().playheadPosition, calls createGeneratedClip with duration=5 and promptHistory carrying the user prompt; success path shows committedClipId in green, missing-graphics-track shows an inline 'Add a graphics track first' yellow banner (we intentionally do not auto-create the track in this slice). Header label updated from 'AI Object Generator (feat-006 MVP)' to 'AI Object Generator'. (d) apps/web/src/components/ParamPanel/ (new) holds schemaToFields.ts (pure JSON-Schema → discriminated-union FieldDescriptor mapper: color | number | select | boolean | text | vector | unknown — recognizes type+format=color, type+enum, type=number with min/max/multipleOf, type=integer (step=1), type=boolean, vector via {properties:{x:number,y:number}}, unknown shapes fall through to a read-only JSON dump rather than crashing) + ParamPanel.tsx (re-exports a sister name GeneratedClipSection — InspectorPanel uses that one) + index.ts barrel. ParamPanel subscribes to project.modifiedAt so param edits re-render, and on input change calls useProjectStore.getState().updateGeneratedClipParams(clipId, { ...current.params, [key]: value }). It also surfaces provider id + model in the section header. InspectorPanel.tsx: selectedClip useMemo grew a getGeneratedClip lookup branch returning a normalized shape with mediaId 'generated-{id}'; clipType useMemo grew an early-return for that mediaId prefix; added showGeneratedSection + a Section 'AI Object Parameters' (sectionId 'generated-clip-params') wrapping <GeneratedClipSection clipId=... />. Keyframe binding for params is intentionally deferred to feat-009 (Action/state system) — the existing project-store.updateClipKeyframes API is the future entry point; ParamPanel writes flat overwrites for now. Manual UI smoke against a real DeepSeek key (Ctrl+Shift+G → Generate → Add to timeline → main preview animation matches panel preview → ParamPanel color edit updates main preview live without re-running AI → delete clip evicts Worker via SandboxRegistry.dispose) is the user-side acceptance step recorded in progress.md.

features.name: Slice 4 — Monaco source editor
features.description: Component `apps/web/src/components/SourceEditor/` opens on double-click of a GeneratedClip and shows its `source`. Save re-mounts the clip's sandbox with new source. 'Ask AI to refactor' button: send selection + instruction to provider, replace selection with response.

features.name: Slice 5 — Action/state system
features.description: Allow each GeneratedClip to define named states (idle/walk/jump etc.) as parameter presets. Timeline can place 'state change' markers that trigger smooth transitions of params between states. Built on top of existing keyframe machinery, no new core engine.

features.name: Slice 6 — Object template library + E2E verification
features.description: Bundled object templates (stick figure, geometric shapes, text bubble, emoji character). User can pick a template and ask AI to mutate it. End-to-end smoke: prompt → generate → add to timeline → tweak params → export mp4, with playback matching preview at 1080p.

policies.additive_only: New code lives in src/ai/, src/objects/, src/components/AIPanel|ParamPanel|SourceEditor/. Existing openreel files only modified if the feature strictly requires it.
